title: Attack the Chain Base
subtitle: Strike the root of the pawn chain
summary: White has built a pawn chain with its base on d4. Play as Black and undermine the base before White gets rolling.

body.goal: Find the pawn break that attacks the base of White's chain, then play on against the engine.
body.successHint: A pawn chain is weakest at its base. White's base is on d4 — which pawn can hit it?
body.explain: Right. ...c5 strikes the base of White's chain on d4. Undermine the base and the whole chain becomes loose.
body.wrong: Aim lower. A pawn chain is hardest to defend at its base, so target the pawn the chain stands on.

misplays.explain: ...f6 chips at the head of the chain on e5, but the base on d4 is the real target — and ...f6 opens your own king. Hit the base with ...c5.
